home.title: PreSfM
home.subtitle: A video pre-processing system designed to improve 3D reconstruction quality with OpenSfM.
home.createProjectDescription: Upload a video and the system will automatically create a project, dataset and prepare the data for OpenSfM pipeline.
home.publicProjectsDescription: Projects publicly shared in the system.

auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create account and verify email by OTP.

ResetPassword.title: Reset password
ResetPassword.description: Enter a new password for your account.
ResetPassword.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters long.
ResetPassword.failed: Failed to reset password. The token may have expired.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.subtitle: Enter your current password and the new password.
changePassword.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters long.
changePassword.samePassword: New password cannot be the same as the current password.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information and user status.
profile.fullNameTooLong: Full name must not exceed 100 characters.

dashboard.title: Dataset Quality Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Before vs after preprocessing performance indicators.
dashboard.trackingSubtitle: Processing stage and progress from WebSocket.

projects.title: Project Upload
projects.subtitle: Upload video to start production pipeline.
projects.uploadInstructions: Drag & drop or click to select video
projects.fileSizeLimit: MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV · Up to 2GB
projects.emptyMyProjects: You don't have any projects yet. Create a new project to get started.
projects.listDescription: Projects you have created and are processing. Click on a project to see details and processing progress.

line1.title: Line 1: Raw images
line1.description: Images directly cut from video, no , no mask.
line1.raw_description: Images directly cut from video, no denoising, no mask.

line2.title: Line 2: Processed images
line2.description: Raw images go through denoising, blur filtering and dynamic object mask generation.
line2.processed_description: Images after denoising, blur filtering and preprocessing.

opensfmResultView.title: OpenSfM reconstruction result comparison
opensfmResultView.description: Compare reconstruction results between raw image flow and processed image flow.

create.title: Create new project
create.subtitle: Upload a video, add metadata, and start the background processing pipeline.
create.projectNamePlaceholder: Example: 3D reconstruction of a campus scene
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Example: A street-scene reconstruction test video captured by phone...
create.datasetNamePlaceholder: Leave empty to use the project name
create.invalidSession: Invalid session. Please sign in again.
create.uploadFailed: Could not create the project or start the pipeline.
create.pipelineStarted: The pipeline has started in the background.

projectDetail.runningDescription: Current stage: {stage}. You can leave this page while the system continues processing in the background.
projectDetail.completedWithoutResult: The pipeline has completed, but comparison data is not available yet.
projectDetail.failedDescription: Something went wrong during processing. Please check backend logs.
projectDetail.noPipeline: This project does not have any pipeline run yet.

opensfmMetrics.title: OpenSfM result comparison
opensfmMetrics.description: Compare reconstruction quality between Raw Flow and Processed Flow.
